name: White Bean Chicken Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium red bell pepper, chop fine
2 Cans white beans, 15 ounces each, undrained
1 Can low sodium chicken broth, 14.5 oz.
1/2 Pound roasted chicken breast meat, cut into 1/2 in. cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil over medium heat in a large pot.
2. Add onion, garlic, and red pepper. Cook for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in white beans, chiles, cumin, chili powder, and broth. Bring to boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer until hot, about 10 minutes.
5. Stir in chicken. Simmer another 5 minutes.
6. Add lime juice and cilantro. Season with a tablespoon of salsa for garnish (optional).
